# Acme Events v2

Catalog and inventory event streams for the Acme fixture.

## Channels

- [catalog/products/created](channel/catalog-products-created.md)
- [catalog/products/deleted](channel/catalog-products-deleted.md)
- [inventory/adjustments](channel/inventory-adjustments.md)

## Operations

- [Product created event](operations/publishProductCreated.md)
- [Product deleted event](operations/publishProductDeleted.md)
- [Stream inventory adjustments](operations/subscribeInventoryAdjustments.md)

## Messages

- [Message InventoryAdjustmentEvent](message/InventoryAdjustmentEvent.md)
- [Message ProductCreated](message/ProductCreated.md)
- [Message ProductDeleted](message/ProductDeleted.md)

## Schemas

- [Schema InventoryAdjustment](schemas/InventoryAdjustment.md)
- [Schema Problem](schemas/Problem.md)
- [Schema Product](schemas/Product.md)
- [Schema ProductDeletedPayload](schemas/ProductDeletedPayload.md)
